TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Qoyaw ga niya mki sku Toweng si atu Hosing Ku, kwara sali buwan nya ga 25 buwan, 115 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 95% kyan ku 109 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 5% kyan ku 6 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 90%, binah lihuyan s'uli 5%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ru kyokay. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Qoyaw hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na Qoyaw hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Qoyaw hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Qoyaw hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Qoyaw hya' ga Silong. tay 'zil na Qoyaw hya' ga Bilus. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ qojaw ɣa nija mki s~ɕku toweŋ s~ɕi atu ħos~ɕiŋ ku, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku * ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, tajan **%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ru kjokaj. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na qojaw ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj ʔzil na qojaw ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkjaħuʔ na qojaw ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkrajaʔ na qojaw ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na qojaw ħjaʔ ɣa s~ɕiloŋ. taj ʔzil na qojaw ħjaʔ ɣa βilus~ɕ. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: alang Qoyaw ga niya mki sku Toweng si atu Hosing Ku, kwara sali buwan nya ga 25 buwan, 115 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 95% kyan ku 109 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 5% kyan ku 6 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 90%, binah lihuyan s'uli 5%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ru kyokay. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Qoyaw hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na Qoyaw hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Qoyaw hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Qoyaw hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Qoyaw hya' ga Silong. tay 'zil na Qoyaw hya' ga Bilus. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ qojaw ɣa nija mki s~ɕku toweŋ s~ɕi atu ħos~ɕiŋ ku, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku * ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, tajan **%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ru kjokaj. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na qojaw ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj ʔzil na qojaw ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkjaħuʔ na qojaw ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkrajaʔ na qojaw ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na qojaw ħjaʔ ɣa s~ɕiloŋ. taj ʔzil na qojaw ħjaʔ ɣa βilus~ɕ. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
